issues.sample: The contact wife owns a 2018 Infiniti QX80 AWD. The contact stated that the Telematics Control Unit (TCU) of the vehicle operated in 3G however, the AT&T servers were shutting down causing the functionality of the TCU to become inoperable. The vehicle was not taken to a dealer. T

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2018 INFINITI QX80. WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 38-40 MPH, THE DRIVER OF AN ONCOMING VEHICLE FAILED TO YIELD THE RIGHT OF WAY AND CRASHED INTO THE DRIVER'S SIDE DOOR AND DRIVER'S SIDE FRONT FENDER OF THE CONTACT'S VEHICLE. THE DRIVER'S FRONTAL AIR BAG DEPLO
The dashboard  bulbs went out from 0-40 mph and 6-8 rpms.  It seems to be a common issue on Reddit and I have found complaints on the internet.

narrative.headline: What 2018 Infiniti Qx80 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 8 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (50% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
